# CWE-1067 vulnerable: leading-wildcard LIKE scan
lang: go
file: CWE-1067-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

// CWE-1067: Excessive Execution of Sequential Searches of Data Resource.
// Vulnerable: GORM query uses LIKE '%term%' forcing full table scan on notes.body.

import (
	"fmt"
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

type Note struct {
	ID   uint
	Body string
}

func SearchNotes(db *gorm.DB) gin.HandlerFunc {
	return func(c *gin.Context) {
		term := c.Query("q")
		var notes []Note
		pattern := fmt.Sprintf("%%%s%%", term)
		if err := db.Where("body LIKE ?", pattern).Find(&notes).Error; err != nil {
			c.JSON(http.StatusInternalServerError, gin.H{"error": err.Error()})
			return
		}
		c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"results": notes})
	}
}
